stemHtml:
Given the following information, calculate the true altitude of the aircraft to ensure that the Minimum Obstacle Clearance is available.

Minimum Obstacle Clearance Altitude (MOCA): 4870 ft
Cruise: FL60
Local aerodrome QNH: 995 hPa
Local aerodrome elevation: 2430 ft
OAT: ISA -15°C
Assume 1 hPa = 30 ft
